record.field:
#Odoo14 proses perhitungan multi pph, di contract harus dipilih salah satu type nya (Nett, Gross, Gross UP) #PPH untuk Karyawan, PHL Bulanan, Konsultan 1 PTK / >1 PTK, Komisaris #bruto2---->ada perhitungan Bonus-THR (jangan salah duga ya) !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! bulgab = 1 if int(str(contract.date_start)[:-6]) < int(str(payslip.date_from)[:-6]) else int(str(contract.date_start)[-5:-3]) buljl = int(str(payslip.date_from)[-5:-3]) bulbr = (13 - bulgab) - (12 - buljl) jumbl = (13 - bulgab) if contract.date_end==False else bulbr jbtn = 500000 lp1 = 60000000 lp2 = 190000000 lp3 = 250000000 lpx = lp1+lp2+lp3 lp4 = 4500000000 lpy = lpx+lp4 lp5 = 999999999999 p21= 0.00 pph_thr= 0.00 if contract.use_nett==True or contract.use_gross==True: bruto= ((categories.GAPOK * 0.5) + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) if (contract.type_id.name=='NONK' and contract.job_id.name=='Consultant') else (categories.GAPOK + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) bruto2=((categories.GAPOK * 0.5) + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH) if (contract.type_id.name=='NONK' and contract.job_id.name=='Consultant') else (categories.GAPOK + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH) sijabat = 0.00 if (contract.type_id.name=='PHL' or contract.type_id.name=='NONK') else (bruto * 0.05) if ((bruto * 0.05) - (categories.PREJAB + categories.PREJABTHR)) < jbtn else (jbtn + categories.PREJAB + categories.PREJABTHR) bijatbon = 0.00 if (contract.type_id.name=='PHL' or contract.type_id.name=='NONK') else ((categories.BTH * 0.05) + (categories.PREBTH * 0.05)) if (sijabat + ((categories.BTH * 0.05) + (categories.PREBTH * 0.05))) < (jbtn*bulbr) else ((jbtn*bulbr)-sijabat) p_netto = bruto - (categories.PEN + categories.PPEN + sijabat) p_netto2 = bruto2 - (categories.PEN + categories.PPEN + sijabat + bijatbon) nett_thn = round(p_netto + contract.bruto_sblm) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((p_netto - pph_thr) * (jumbl/bulbr) + pph_thr,2) + contract.bruto_sblm nett_thn2 = round(p_netto + contract.bruto_sblm) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((p_netto2 + bijatbon - categories.BTH - categories.PREBTH - pph_thr) * (jumbl/bulbr) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH + pph_thr - bijatbon),2) + contract.bruto_sblm pkp = int((nett_thn - (contract.ptkp_rate * bulbr))/1000) * 1000 if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else int((nett_thn - contract.ptkp_rate)/1000) * 1000 pkp2 = int((nett_thn - (contract.ptkp_rate * bulbr))/1000) * 1000 if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else int((nett_thn2 - contract.ptkp_rate)/1000) * 1000
if pkp > 0 and pkp <= lp1: cp21= round(((pkp * 0.05) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp1 and (pkp - lp1) <= lp2: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+((pkp-lp1)* 0.15)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp2 and (pkp - lp3) <= lp3: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+((pkp-lp3)*0.25)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp3 and (pkp - (lpx)) <= lp4: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+((pkp-(lpx))*0.3)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) elif pkp >(lpy) and (pkp - (lpy)) <= lp5: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+(lp4 * 0.3)+((pkp-(lpy))*0.35)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) else: cp21= 0.00
if pkp2 > 0 and pkp2 <= lp1: cp22= round(((pkp2 * 0.05) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp1 and (pkp2 - lp1) <= lp2: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+((pkp2 - lp1)* 0.15)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp2 and (pkp2 - lp3) <= lp3: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+((pkp2 - lp3)*0.25)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp3 and (pkp2 - (lpx)) <= lp4: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+((pkp2 - (lpx))*0.3)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) elif pkp2 >(lpy) and (pkp2 - (lpy)) <= lp5: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+(lp4 * 0.3)+((pkp2-(lpy))*0.35)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) else: cp22= 0.00
pph_ts= round((cp22 * jumbl/bulbr) - (cp21 * jumbl/bulbr), 2) pph_setor= round((cp21 * jumbl/bulbr), 2) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((cp21 + pph_ts), 2) pph_thr = pph_ts
result=sijabat - categories.PREJAB else: while True: bruto= ((categories.GAPOK * 0.5) + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (p21 - categories.PREPPH) if (contract.type_id.name=='NONK' and contract.job_id.name=='Consultant') else (categories.GAPOK + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (p21 - categories.PREPPH) bruto2=((categories.GAPOK * 0.5) + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH) + (p21 - categories.PREPPH) if (contract.type_id.name=='NONK' and contract.job_id.name=='Consultant') else (categories.GAPOK + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH) + (p21 - categories.PREPPH) sijabat = 0.00 if (contract.type_id.name=='PHL' or contract.type_id.name=='NONK') else (bruto * 0.05) if ((bruto * 0.05) - (categories.PREJAB + categories.PREJABTHR)) < jbtn else (jbtn + categories.PREJAB + categories.PREJABTHR) bijatbon = 0.00 if (contract.type_id.name=='PHL' or contract.type_id.name=='NONK') else ((categories.BTH * 0.05) + (categories.PREBTH * 0.05)) if (sijabat + ((categories.BTH * 0.05) + (categories.PREBTH * 0.05))) < (jbtn*bulbr) else ((jbtn*bulbr)-sijabat) p_netto = bruto - (categories.PEN + categories.PPEN + sijabat) p_netto2 = bruto2 - (categories.PEN + categories.PPEN + sijabat + bijatbon) nett_thn = round(p_netto + contract.bruto_sblm) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((p_netto - pph_thr) * (jumbl/bulbr) + pph_thr,2) + contract.bruto_sblm nett_thn2 = round(p_netto + contract.bruto_sblm) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((p_netto2 + bijatbon - categories.BTH - categories.PREBTH - pph_thr) * (jumbl/bulbr) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH + pph_thr - bijatbon),2) + contract.bruto_sblm pkp = int((nett_thn - (contract.ptkp_rate * bulbr))/1000) * 1000 if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else int((nett_thn - contract.ptkp_rate)/1000) * 1000 pkp2 = int((nett_thn - (contract.ptkp_rate * bulbr))/1000) * 1000 if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else int((nett_thn2 - contract.ptkp_rate)/1000) * 1000
if pkp > 0 and pkp <= lp1: cp21= round(((pkp * 0.05) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp1 and (pkp - lp1) <= lp2: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+((pkp-lp1)* 0.15)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp2 and (pkp - lp3) <= lp3: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+((pkp-lp3)*0.25)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp3 and (pkp - (lpx)) <= lp4: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+((pkp-(lpx))*0.3)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) elif pkp >(lpy) and (pkp - (lpy)) <= lp5: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+(lp4 * 0.3)+((pkp-(lpy))*0.35)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) else: cp21= 0.00
if pkp2 > 0 and pkp2 <= lp1: cp22= round(((pkp2 * 0.05) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp1 and (pkp2 - lp1) <= lp2: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+((pkp2 - lp1)* 0.15)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp2 and (pkp2 - lp3) <= lp3: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+((pkp2 - lp3)*0.25)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp3 and (pkp2 - (lpx)) <= lp4: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+((pkp2 - (lpx))*0.3)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) elif pkp2 >(lpy) and (pkp2 - (lpy)) <= lp5: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+(lp4 * 0.3)+((pkp2-(lpy))*0.35)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) else: cp22= 0.00
pph_ts= round((cp22 * jumbl/bulbr) - (cp21 * jumbl/bulbr), 2) pph_setor= round((cp21 * jumbl/bulbr), 2) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((cp21 + pph_ts), 2)
if p21==pph_setor: break else: p21=pph_setor pph_thr=pph_ts result=sijabat - categories.PREJAB

#Odoo14 proses perhitungan multi pph, di contract harus dipilih salah satu type nya (Nett, Gross, Gross UP) #PPH untuk Karyawan, PHL Bulanan, Konsultan 1 PTK / >1 PTK, Komisaris #bruto2 ---->ada perhitungan Bonus-THR (jangan salah duga ya) !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! bulgab = 1 if int(str(contract.date_start)[:-6]) < int(str(payslip.date_from)[:-6]) else int(str(contract.date_start)[-5:-3]) buljl = int(str(payslip.date_from)[-5:-3]) bulbr = (13 - bulgab) - (12 - buljl) jumbl = (13 - bulgab) if contract.date_end==False else bulbr jbtn = 500000 lp1 = 60000000 lp2 = 190000000 lp3 = 250000000 lpx = lp1+lp2+lp3 lp4 = 4500000000 lpy = lpx+lp4 lp5 = 999999999999 p21= 0.00 pph_thr= 0.00 if contract.use_nett==True or contract.use_gross==True: bruto= ((categories.GAPOK * 0.5) + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) if (contract.type_id.name=='NONK' and contract.job_id.name=='Consultant') else (categories.GAPOK + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) bruto2=((categories.GAPOK * 0.5) + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH) if (contract.type_id.name=='NONK' and contract.job_id.name=='Consultant') else (categories.GAPOK + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH) sijabat = 0.00 if (contract.type_id.name=='PHL' or contract.type_id.name=='NONK') else (bruto * 0.05) if ((bruto * 0.05) - (categories.PREJAB + categories.PREJABTHR)) < jbtn else (jbtn + categories.PREJAB + categories.PREJABTHR) bijatbon = 0.00 if (contract.type_id.name=='PHL' or contract.type_id.name=='NONK') else ((categories.BTH * 0.05) + (categories.PREBTH * 0.05)) if (sijabat + ((categories.BTH * 0.05) + (categories.PREBTH * 0.05))) < (jbtn*bulbr) else ((jbtn*bulbr)-sijabat) p_netto = bruto - (categories.PEN + categories.PPEN + sijabat) p_netto2 = bruto2 - (categories.PEN + categories.PPEN + sijabat + bijatbon) nett_thn = round(p_netto + contract.bruto_sblm) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((p_netto - pph_thr) * (jumbl/bulbr) + pph_thr,2) + contract.bruto_sblm nett_thn2 = round(p_netto + contract.bruto_sblm) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((p_netto2 + bijatbon - categories.BTH - categories.PREBTH - pph_thr) * (jumbl/bulbr) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH + pph_thr - bijatbon),2) + contract.bruto_sblm pkp = int((nett_thn - (contract.ptkp_rate * bulbr))/1000) * 1000 if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else int((nett_thn - contract.ptkp_rate)/1000) * 1000 pkp2 = int((nett_thn - (contract.ptkp_rate * bulbr))/1000) * 1000 if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else int((nett_thn2 - contract.ptkp_rate)/1000) * 1000
if pkp > 0 and pkp <= lp1: cp21= round(((pkp * 0.05) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp1 and (pkp - lp1) <= lp2: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+((pkp-lp1)* 0.15)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp2 and (pkp - lp3) <= lp3: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+((pkp-lp3)*0.25)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp3 and (pkp - (lpx)) <= lp4: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+((pkp-(lpx))*0.3)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) elif pkp >(lpy) and (pkp - (lpy)) <= lp5: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+(lp4 * 0.3)+((pkp-(lpy))*0.35)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) else: cp21= 0.00
if pkp2 > 0 and pkp2 <= lp1: cp22= round(((pkp2 * 0.05) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp1 and (pkp2 - lp1) <= lp2: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+((pkp2 - lp1)* 0.15)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp2 and (pkp2 - lp3) <= lp3: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+((pkp2 - lp3)*0.25)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp3 and (pkp2 - (lpx)) <= lp4: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+((pkp2 - (lpx))*0.3)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) elif pkp2 >(lpy) and (pkp2 - (lpy)) <= lp5: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+(lp4 * 0.3)+((pkp2-(lpy))*0.35)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) else: cp22= 0.00
pph_ts= round((cp22 * jumbl/bulbr) - (cp21 * jumbl/bulbr), 2) pph_setor= round((cp21 * jumbl/bulbr), 2) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((cp21 + pph_ts), 2) pph_thr = pph_ts
result=pkp else: while True: bruto= ((categories.GAPOK * 0.5) + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (p21 - categories.PREPPH) if (contract.type_id.name=='NONK' and contract.job_id.name=='Consultant') else (categories.GAPOK + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (p21 - categories.PREPPH) bruto2=((categories.GAPOK * 0.5) + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH) + (p21 - categories.PREPPH) if (contract.type_id.name=='NONK' and contract.job_id.name=='Consultant') else (categories.GAPOK + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH) + (p21 - categories.PREPPH) sijabat = 0.00 if (contract.type_id.name=='PHL' or contract.type_id.name=='NONK') else (bruto * 0.05) if ((bruto * 0.05) - (categories.PREJAB + categories.PREJABTHR)) < jbtn else (jbtn + categories.PREJAB + categories.PREJABTHR) bijatbon = 0.00 if (contract.type_id.name=='PHL' or contract.type_id.name=='NONK') else ((categories.BTH * 0.05) + (categories.PREBTH * 0.05)) if (sijabat + ((categories.BTH * 0.05) + (categories.PREBTH * 0.05))) < (jbtn*bulbr) else ((jbtn*bulbr)-sijabat) p_netto = bruto - (categories.PEN + categories.PPEN + sijabat) p_netto2 = bruto2 - (categories.PEN + categories.PPEN + sijabat + bijatbon) nett_thn = round(p_netto + contract.bruto_sblm) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((p_netto - pph_thr) * (jumbl/bulbr) + pph_thr,2) + contract.bruto_sblm nett_thn2 = round(p_netto + contract.bruto_sblm) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((p_netto2 + bijatbon - categories.BTH - categories.PREBTH - pph_thr) * (jumbl/bulbr) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH + pph_thr - bijatbon),2) + contract.bruto_sblm pkp = int((nett_thn - (contract.ptkp_rate * bulbr))/1000) * 1000 if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else int((nett_thn - contract.ptkp_rate)/1000) * 1000 pkp2 = int((nett_thn - (contract.ptkp_rate * bulbr))/1000) * 1000 if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else int((nett_thn2 - contract.ptkp_rate)/1000) * 1000
if pkp > 0 and pkp <= lp1: cp21= round(((pkp * 0.05) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp1 and (pkp - lp1) <= lp2: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+((pkp-lp1)* 0.15)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp2 and (pkp - lp3) <= lp3: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+((pkp-lp3)*0.25)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp3 and (pkp - (lpx)) <= lp4: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+((pkp-(lpx))*0.3)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) elif pkp >(lpy) and (pkp - (lpy)) <= lp5: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+(lp4 * 0.3)+((pkp-(lpy))*0.35)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) else: cp21= 0.00
if pkp2 > 0 and pkp2 <= lp1: cp22= round(((pkp2 * 0.05) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp1 and (pkp2 - lp1) <= lp2: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+((pkp2 - lp1)* 0.15)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp2 and (pkp2 - lp3) <= lp3: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+((pkp2 - lp3)*0.25)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp3 and (pkp2 - (lpx)) <= lp4: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+((pkp2 - (lpx))*0.3)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) elif pkp2 >(lpy) and (pkp2 - (lpy)) <= lp5: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+(lp4 * 0.3)+((pkp2-(lpy))*0.35)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) else: cp22= 0.00
pph_ts= round((cp22 * jumbl/bulbr) - (cp21 * jumbl/bulbr), 2) pph_setor= round((cp21 * jumbl/bulbr), 2) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((cp21 + pph_ts), 2)
if p21==pph_setor: break else: p21=pph_setor pph_thr=pph_ts result=pkp

#Odoo14 proses perhitungan multi pph, di contract harus dipilih salah satu type nya (Nett, Gross, Gross UP) #PPH untuk Karyawan, PHL Bulanan, Konsultan 1 PTK / >1 PTK, Komisaris #bruto2 ---->ada perhitungan Bonus-THR (jangan salah duga ya) !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! bulgab = 1 if int(str(contract.date_start)[:-6]) < int(str(payslip.date_from)[:-6]) else int(str(contract.date_start)[-5:-3]) buljl = int(str(payslip.date_from)[-5:-3]) bulbr = (13 - bulgab) - (12 - buljl) jumbl = (13 - bulgab) if contract.date_end==False else bulbr jbtn = 500000 lp1 = 60000000 lp2 = 190000000 lp3 = 250000000 lpx = lp1+lp2+lp3 lp4 = 4500000000 lpy = lpx+lp4 lp5 = 999999999999 p21= 0.00 pph_thr= 0.00 if contract.use_nett==True or contract.use_gross==True: bruto= ((categories.GAPOK * 0.5) + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) if (contract.type_id.name=='NONK' and contract.job_id.name=='Consultant') else (categories.GAPOK + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) bruto2=((categories.GAPOK * 0.5) + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH) if (contract.type_id.name=='NONK' and contract.job_id.name=='Consultant') else (categories.GAPOK + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH) sijabat = 0.00 if (contract.type_id.name=='PHL' or contract.type_id.name=='NONK') else (bruto * 0.05) if ((bruto * 0.05) - (categories.PREJAB + categories.PREJABTHR)) < jbtn else (jbtn + categories.PREJAB + categories.PREJABTHR) bijatbon = 0.00 if (contract.type_id.name=='PHL' or contract.type_id.name=='NONK') else ((categories.BTH * 0.05) + (categories.PREBTH * 0.05)) if (sijabat + ((categories.BTH * 0.05) + (categories.PREBTH * 0.05))) < (jbtn*bulbr) else ((jbtn*bulbr)-sijabat) p_netto = bruto - (categories.PEN + categories.PPEN + sijabat) p_netto2 = bruto2 - (categories.PEN + categories.PPEN + sijabat + bijatbon) nett_thn = round(p_netto + contract.bruto_sblm) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((p_netto - pph_thr) * (jumbl/bulbr) + pph_thr,2) + contract.bruto_sblm nett_thn2 = round(p_netto + contract.bruto_sblm) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((p_netto2 + bijatbon - categories.BTH - categories.PREBTH - pph_thr) * (jumbl/bulbr) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH + pph_thr - bijatbon),2) + contract.bruto_sblm pkp = int((nett_thn - (contract.ptkp_rate * bulbr))/1000) * 1000 if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else int((nett_thn - contract.ptkp_rate)/1000) * 1000 pkp2 = int((nett_thn - (contract.ptkp_rate * bulbr))/1000) * 1000 if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else int((nett_thn2 - contract.ptkp_rate)/1000) * 1000
if pkp > 0 and pkp <= lp1: cp21= round(((pkp * 0.05) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp1 and (pkp - lp1) <= lp2: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+((pkp-lp1)* 0.15)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp2 and (pkp - lp3) <= lp3: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+((pkp-lp3)*0.25)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp3 and (pkp - (lpx)) <= lp4: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+((pkp-(lpx))*0.3)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) elif pkp >(lpy) and (pkp - (lpy)) <= lp5: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+(lp4 * 0.3)+((pkp-(lpy))*0.35)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) else: cp21= 0.00
if pkp2 > 0 and pkp2 <= lp1: cp22= round(((pkp2 * 0.05) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp1 and (pkp2 - lp1) <= lp2: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+((pkp2 - lp1)* 0.15)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp2 and (pkp2 - lp3) <= lp3: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+((pkp2 - lp3)*0.25)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp3 and (pkp2 - (lpx)) <= lp4: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+((pkp2 - (lpx))*0.3)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) elif pkp2 >(lpy) and (pkp2 - (lpy)) <= lp5: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+(lp4 * 0.3)+((pkp2-(lpy))*0.35)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) else: cp22= 0.00
pph_ts= round((cp22 * jumbl/bulbr) - (cp21 * jumbl/bulbr), 2) pph_setor= round((cp21 * jumbl/bulbr), 2) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((cp21 + pph_ts), 2) pph_thr = pph_ts
result=pkp2 else: while True: bruto= ((categories.GAPOK * 0.5) + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (p21 - categories.PREPPH) if (contract.type_id.name=='NONK' and contract.job_id.name=='Consultant') else (categories.GAPOK + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (p21 - categories.PREPPH) bruto2=((categories.GAPOK * 0.5) + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH) + (p21 - categories.PREPPH) if (contract.type_id.name=='NONK' and contract.job_id.name=='Consultant') else (categories.GAPOK + categories.PNR) + (categories.PBRUT) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH) + (p21 - categories.PREPPH) sijabat = 0.00 if (contract.type_id.name=='PHL' or contract.type_id.name=='NONK') else (bruto * 0.05) if ((bruto * 0.05) - (categories.PREJAB + categories.PREJABTHR)) < jbtn else (jbtn + categories.PREJAB + categories.PREJABTHR) bijatbon = 0.00 if (contract.type_id.name=='PHL' or contract.type_id.name=='NONK') else ((categories.BTH * 0.05) + (categories.PREBTH * 0.05)) if (sijabat + ((categories.BTH * 0.05) + (categories.PREBTH * 0.05))) < (jbtn*bulbr) else ((jbtn*bulbr)-sijabat) p_netto = bruto - (categories.PEN + categories.PPEN + sijabat) p_netto2 = bruto2 - (categories.PEN + categories.PPEN + sijabat + bijatbon) nett_thn = round(p_netto + contract.bruto_sblm) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((p_netto - pph_thr) * (jumbl/bulbr) + pph_thr,2) + contract.bruto_sblm nett_thn2 = round(p_netto + contract.bruto_sblm) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((p_netto2 + bijatbon - categories.BTH - categories.PREBTH - pph_thr) * (jumbl/bulbr) + (categories.BTH + categories.PREBTH + pph_thr - bijatbon),2) + contract.bruto_sblm pkp = int((nett_thn - (contract.ptkp_rate * bulbr))/1000) * 1000 if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else int((nett_thn - contract.ptkp_rate)/1000) * 1000 pkp2 = int((nett_thn - (contract.ptkp_rate * bulbr))/1000) * 1000 if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else int((nett_thn2 - contract.ptkp_rate)/1000) * 1000
if pkp > 0 and pkp <= lp1: cp21= round(((pkp * 0.05) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp1 and (pkp - lp1) <= lp2: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+((pkp-lp1)* 0.15)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp2 and (pkp - lp3) <= lp3: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+((pkp-lp3)*0.25)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp >lp3 and (pkp - (lpx)) <= lp4: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+((pkp-(lpx))*0.3)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) elif pkp >(lpy) and (pkp - (lpy)) <= lp5: cp21= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+(lp4 * 0.3)+((pkp-(lpy))*0.35)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) else: cp21= 0.00
if pkp2 > 0 and pkp2 <= lp1: cp22= round(((pkp2 * 0.05) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp1 and (pkp2 - lp1) <= lp2: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+((pkp2 - lp1)* 0.15)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp2 and (pkp2 - lp3) <= lp3: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+((pkp2 - lp3)*0.25)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr),2) elif pkp2 >lp3 and (pkp2 - (lpx)) <= lp4: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+((pkp2 - (lpx))*0.3)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) elif pkp2 >(lpy) and (pkp2 - (lpy)) <= lp5: cp22= round((((lp1*0.05)+(lp2 * 0.15)+(lp3 * 0.25)+(lp4 * 0.3)+((pkp2-(lpy))*0.35)) - contract.pph_sblm) / (jumbl/bulbr), 2) else: cp22= 0.00
pph_ts= round((cp22 * jumbl/bulbr) - (cp21 * jumbl/bulbr), 2) pph_setor= round((cp21 * jumbl/bulbr), 2) if contract.type_id.name=='NONK' else round((cp21 + pph_ts), 2)
if p21==pph_setor: break else: p21=pph_setor pph_thr=pph_ts result=pkp2
